calendar.matters:
RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Set For Trial On Mar-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Continued To Mar-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: STEPHEN COLLIER, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/APPELLANT, LON PARKER
GARY B. BROWN FOR PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT, VAN NESS MANAGEMENT LLC C/O GARY B BROWN

9:50am. Case comes transferred from Master Court Calendar for Small Claims Appeals.
Court and parties are present as indicated above. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Mr.Gary B.Brown states his case on behalf of Van Ness Management, LLC., Plaintiff/Respondent. The Court hears testimony from the following witnesses, San Juanita Valdez and Floyd Villareal. The following documentary evidence are offered and received by the Court:
1. Photocopy of Check #152 - $150.00 2. San Francisco Police Department Incident Report
3. Letter dated June 15, 2005 from Gary B. Brown to Lon Parker
4. Letter dated October 25, 2005 from Gary B. Brown to Lon Parker
5. Letter dated June 6, 2005 from Janin, Morgan & Brenner to Stephen Collier
6. 5 Letters between Lon Parker and Van Ness Management LLC

Mr. Collier states his case on behalf of Defendant/Appellant, Lon Parker. The Court hears testimony from the following witnesses: Gary Brown, Rachel Hudson, Michael McBride and Lon Parker. The following documentary evidence are offered and received by the Court:
A. Witness Statement of San Juanita Valdez
B. Department of Building Inspection - Notice of Violation dated May 5,2005
C. Proof of Personal Service - Civil filed June 6,2005
D1-D3. Color Red Print-Outs of Doors per testimony
E. Emergency Commnications Department - Declaration dated October 19, 2005

12:16pm. Court takes matter under submission. Parties will be notified of the Court decision by mail.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-02-2006 Continued To Mar-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
